source_types.label: Public repository accession
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Downloaded or API-fetched metadata plus reusable matrix/table/object with checksum and provenance.

source_types.label: Author repository
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Repository files must be inventoried with URLs, checksums, file sizes, and parser outputs.

source_types.label: Article supplementary table
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Supplementary file must be downloaded, checksummed, sheet/table names recorded, and sample/feature/phenotype fields mapped.

source_types.label: Controlled-access human data
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Can be indexed as metadata, but not exposed as public processed evidence unless access terms permit derived public summaries.

source_types.label: Figure-only quantitative evidence
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Do not use as primary database data. Only record as literature evidence unless source values are available.

source_types.label: Literature-only claim
source_types.processed_layer_requirement: Can support prioritization but not feature-level evidence.
